//: Drop this at the root of any project as `.mcp.json`. Claude Code will auto-load the nwc server when a session starts in this tree. Replace `/absolute/path/to/nwc-mcp` with where you cloned/installed the server. Because the server loads its own .env, leave the `env` block empty and configure secrets in nwc-mcp/.env — that way they stay out of any committed config file.
